summary: Mediocre recording of an average show with a few bright spots, notably Bob's performance on Me & My Uncle.
review: The tape isn’t the sharpest nor does the concert rank among the Dead’s finest, but it offers some enjoyable moments—Bob’s vocal and guitar work on “Me & My Uncle” stands out. The reviewer also highlights “The Other One” and “Hard to Handle” as worthy enough to feature on a radio show, suggesting occasional high points despite overall modest quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; it describes both the show and recording as average with a few positives, leading to an overall middle rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says the recording is “not the greatest,” implying mediocre clarity and mix; no specific details on soundboard or audience source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall an unremarkable set with occasional highlights; lacks a strong, cohesive flow.

band_member_comments.Bob: Nice moments especially on Me & My Uncle.
